overview: Small variation for API Model Creator and Model Variation Creator badges.
usage:
Load from Kaggle Model Hub. Created via API. Model Pipeline Creator is earned by creating a model from a notebook’s output on Kaggle.
Open the notebook: kaggle.com/code/cameronwarrennn/model-pipeline-creator-badge
Click Run All so it writes model.pkl and README.txt to /kaggle/working/.
In the right-hand panel, open the Output (or Data) tab.
Use “Create model from notebook output” (or “New model from output”) and complete the form to create a model from this run’s output.
After the model is created from the notebook output, the Model Pipeline Creator badge should appear.
